rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Surcharge Fiduciary And Other Remedies
rulings.Rulings: Bassin's Motion for Surcharge of Fiduciary Szmokaluk is granted. Szmokaluk must comply with the Court's June 5, 2012 Order and pay Bassin the fees awarded. Szmokaluk will be held personally liable for interests and costs incurred from filing this motion. The Court declines to remove Szmokaluk as executor for now -- pending his carrying out the final tasks of administration. The prevailing party must submit a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative ruling must notify the court and opposing counsel no later than 11/16, at 4:00 p.m.
